SEARCH
Module se1.bestellsystem
Package datamodel

Class OrderBuilder

Object
OrderBuilder
public final class OrderBuilder extends Object
Class to build Order objects as a multi-step process.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    OrderBuilder.BuildState
    Inner class to hold interim states of an partially built Order object.

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderBuilder

      public OrderBuilder(Pricing.PricingCategory pricingCategory, Map<Long,Customer> customers, Map<String,Article> articles)
      Constructor to create OrderBuilder instance.
      Parameters:
      pricingCategory - pricing category used by OrderBuilder instance
      customers - collection of Customer objects as owners of orders
      articles - collection of Article objects used in orders
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if arguments customers or articles are null

  • Method Details

    • buildOrder

      public Optional<Order> buildOrder(String customerSpec, Consumer<OrderBuilder.BuildState> addItems)
      Main build-method for an Order object accepting a Customer specification as id or name. If a Customer object was found, the Order object is created. Ordered items are added through the addItems Consumer interface.
      Parameters:
      customerSpec - specification to look up a Customer object by id or name
      addItems - Consumer interface to add items, invoked only if order was created successfully
      Returns:
      created Order object enclosed in Optional or empty Optional
